title: Personalised Hanging Plaque Your Custom Text Blue Watercolour Floral Decorative Wooden Door Wall Sign Home Décor Add Any Message
features: {Product Details} A fully customisable handmade wooden hanging plaque which can be personalised with your own message. Up to 4 lines of text.

{Decorative & Stylish} The blue watercolour design with pretty floral embelishments is exclusive to the Plum Penguin. It was hand illustrated and is printed in full colour straight onto the wood. Every plaque is packaged in a transparent sleeve, ready to gift, and with a length of rustic hessian jute string for hanging.
{Customisable} You can add your personalised message before checkout. Maximum 120 characters, 30 char. per line. Wording will be resized to fit the printed space available.
{Materials & Size} Actual Size: 200mm (W) x 100mm (L) (8" x 4"). Made from durable 6mm MDF which creates a smooth and vibrant printed finish. ***For Indoor Use Only***

{Handmade in the UK} The plaque is handcrafted in Birmingham, UK, by a small team dedicated to creating high quality, affordable decorations. Every order is cut, printed and packaged with care and attention to ensure the product reaches you in perfect condition.
description: Product Description Add Your Own Text Options Elevate Your Space with Personalised Perfection Transform your home with our exquisite wall art and hanging signs. Crafted from sturdy 6mm MDF wood, each piece exudes charm and durability. Our state-of-the-art printing ensures vibrant designs that pop, whether you opt for the flush-mounted elegance of our A4-sized options or the rustic appeal of our smaller hanging signs. Carefully gift-packaged, our collection offers a diverse range of styles to suit any taste or home decor. Transform your home with our exquisite wall art customised with your own words Previous page Whimsical Kitchen Delights Brighten up your kitchen decor with our charming designs, showcasing popular home decor colors like sage, lemon, lilac. Infuse with your witty quotes, these will turn meal prep into a laughing matter! Culinary Art Kitchen Charm with a Twist Spice up your kitchen decor with colored designs, add hilarious quotes guaranteed to bring laughter to your cooking space. From blush, sage, lemon, lilac and grey, add a dash of humor to every meal! Every Hue Minimalist Elegance Elevate your living room with our black and white neutral designs. Chic and understated, these minimalist pieces add a touch of sophistication to any space. Simple Style Boho Blossoms Bring a touch of natural charm to your living room with our wood-effect designs featuring floral borders. Perfect for creating a boho-inspired oasis of tranquility. Bring a touch of nature indoors. Boho Bliss Next page Charm in Every Detail: Discover Our Wall Plaques Collection Endless Styles for Every Taste From contemporary chic to rustic charm, our personalized wall art and hanging signs offer a wide range of designs and styles to suit every taste and home decor. Whether you're shopping for yourself or searching for the perfect gift, our collection ensures there's something for everyone. Explore our diverse range and find the perfect piece to express yourself. Gifting Rustic Charm Embrace the rustic allure of our smaller hanging signs, adorned with rustic hessian twine for that extra touch of charm. Each piece is meticulously gift packaged, ready to delight your loved ones or add a personal touch to your own space. Discover the joy of gifting or treating yourself to something truly special. Vibrant Expression Dive into a world of vibrant expression with our personalised wall art and hanging signs. Using state-of-the-art printing technology, we ensure every colour bursts to life, every detail sings with clarity. Let your imagination run wild as you create a masterpiece that reflects your unique style and personality. Brilliance for Every Wall Transform your home into a gallery of personalized charm with our A4-sized wall art. Perfect for any space, these flush-mounted pieces seamlessly integrate into your décor, adding a touch of individuality to every room. Elevate your walls with a splash of creativity and watch as your space comes alive. Personalise Your Space: Customisable Wooden Hanging Plaques Tailored Charm Transform your home with our fully customisable hanging wooden signs, tailored to your style and personality. Make every corner uniquely yours! Personalised Gifts Our customised hanging wooden signs are the perfect present. Arr your own text to make this gift tailored with love and meaning for the recipient. Endless Variety A diverse range of styles. We cater to every taste, recipient, and home décor aesthetic. There's something here to suit your unique style. Adaptable Placement From shelves to door handles, our hanging signs find their place in every nook and cranny of your home. Let your creativity run wild. Previous page Made from 6mm mdf - durable and long lasting Smooth and even surface for printing your text. Allows for high-quality printing: sharp details and vibrant colours. Digital laser printing techniques, which offer excellent colour reproduction. Customise me Heartfelt Gifts, Memorable Moments Celebrate life's special moments with our personalized hanging signs, the perfect gift for any occasion and recipient. Crafted with care, each sign is designed to be cherished for years to come. Gifting Win Thoughtful Tokens From weddings to new babies our hanging signs are the perfect way to mark life's milestones. With a wide range of designs and styles to choose from, you can find the ideal match for any recipient. Door Sign Convenient Elegance More than just decorative pieces, our hanging signs serve a purpose while making a statement. Use them as door signs or hang them on knobs. Wherever they're placed, these signs elevate your space. Door Sign Next page ibrant Customisation, Timeless Charm and Elegance Durable Craftsmanship Elevate your décor with our meticulously crafted hanging signs, made from 6mm MDF wood. Not only does this ensure durability that lasts, but it's also a conscious choice for the environment, offering an alternative to traditional acrylic options. Endless Variety, Tailored to You A diverse range of designs and styles, our collection caters to every taste, recipient, home décor aesthetic. Whether you're drawn to modern minimalism or vintage charm, there's something to suit your unique style. Elevate your space with a personalised touch that speaks volumes about who you are.
